---
title: "Intermediate Elective 2"
author: "Abby Malech"
format: 
  pdf:
    include-in-header: 
       text: |
         \usepackage{fvextra}
         \DefineVerbatimEnvironment{Highlighting}{Verbatim}{breaklines,commandchars=\\\{\}}
         \DefineVerbatimEnvironment{OutputCode}{Verbatim}{breaklines,commandchars=\\\{\}}
date: "2026-05-11"
execute: 
  warning: false
  messages: false
---

# Set-up

## Read-in packages
```{r}
#| label: load-packages



```

## Read-in data
```{r}
#| label: load-data





```
